title: OpOres
description: A Minecraft datapack that makes every ore drop insanely overpowered loot when mined.
body:
# OP Ores – by Shirjeel_plays
Mine ores, get insane rewards!
This datapack turns every ore into a treasure chest. Break any ore block and you’ll receive overpowered loot — from enchanted netherite armor and weapons to rare items and resources — making mining more exciting than ever.

## ✨ Features
Custom loot tables for every ore in Minecraft.

Normal and rare drop chances for balanced chaos.

Enchanted netherite gear, rare weapons, golden apples, and more!

Works in both survival and multiplayer worlds.

Fully compatible with Minecraft 1.20.1

## 📌 Creator & Contact
Author: Shirjeel_plays
